originalTitle: South African police chief suspended over $20m health contract
title: South African police chief suspended over $20m health contract
content: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.

originalTitle: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
title: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
content: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.

originalTitle: South African court orders Zambia to return former president's body
title: South African court orders Zambia to return former president's body
content: Zambia authorities and Edgar Lungu's family are in a dispute over where the former leader's remains should be buried.

originalTitle: Funeral held for journalist killed in targeted Israeli strike
title: Funeral held for journalist killed in targeted Israeli strike
content: Mourners attended the funeral of Amal Khalil, a journalist who was killed in an Israeli attack in south Lebanon.

originalTitle: EU formally approves 90bn euro Ukraine loan and new sanctions on Russia
title: EU formally approves 90bn euro Ukraine loan and new sanctions on Russia
content: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy welcomes the development, urging that the first tranche be disbursed by May or June.

originalTitle: Pope decries migrants and refugees being treated ‘worse than house pets’
title: Pope decries migrants and refugees being treated ‘worse than house pets’
content: Pope Leo has previously criticised Donald Trump's immigration policies, calling for better treatment of refugees.

originalTitle: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
content: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.

originalTitle: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
title: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
content: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.

originalTitle: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
title: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
content: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.

originalTitle: Big clubs and big names - a summer of managerial upheaval awaits
title: Big clubs and big names - a summer of managerial upheaval awaits
content: BBC Sport senior football correspondent Sami Mokbel analyses a summer that promises plenty of change in the Premier League.

originalTitle: Football Focus to end after 52 years
title: Football Focus to end after 52 years
content: Football Focus is to end after 52 years, BBC Sport announces.

originalTitle: No Fifa plans for Iran-Italy swap at World Cup despite Trump envoy's suggestion
title: No Fifa plans for Iran-Italy swap at World Cup despite Trump envoy's suggestion
content: Fifa stands by comments made last week by president Gianni Infantino in which he said that "the Iranian team is coming, for sure".
